events.name: Scoot GB – Southern
events.description: Have you got what it takes to qualify?

events.name: Inter-group Competition
events.description: Professional judging, prizes and more. Time to show off what you have learnt.

events.name: Verwood Skate Jam
events.description: Coaching, bike stunts, music, prizes and stalls – a great day out for the whole family.

news.title: Blunt Envy x Youth Riders — Official Deal
news.body: We have partnered with Blunt Envy. We can now sell Blunt Envy spares and complete scooters from our Spares & Repairs room at the parks.

news.title: Improvements Coming to Potterne Park
news.body: Thanks to support from Dorset Council, we are making improvements at Potterne Park in Verwood.

news.title: Youth Riders is now a Registered Charity
news.body: Youth Riders CIO is now officially a registered charity (number 1212183).
